session_focus.summary: Fixed LOC backfill for 2026-07-17-7.json retro file (git log --numstat aggregation). Created setup scripts for Windows Task Scheduler automation: setup-daily-report-schedule.ps1 (daily 6am, 1h timeout) and setup-weekly-report-schedule.ps1 (Monday 6am, 2h timeout). All 3 task setup scripts ready for admin registration: retro-audit (Sundays 6pm), daily-report (daily 6am), weekly-report (Monday 6am).
